---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, cached feature, or model adapter
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what is currently missing or painful?

## Proposed solution

What you would like ProteinTensor to do. If this is a new model adapter or
cached feature, describe the tensors/format involved.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about, and why they fall short.

## Would this change the `.ptt` format?

- [ ] No - additive API only
- [ ] Yes - adds/changes on-disk layout (may need a `FORMAT_VERSION` bump)

## Additional context

Links to the relevant model, paper, or format spec, and any benchmark
expectations.
